docs.text: Kurt Rhee (Simon Kurtis Rhee II) About Me San Diego, California Solar Engineer 4+ years of progressive experience in the solar engineering field spanning residential solar pv systems design, grid scale conceptual design, and grid scale performance modeling Data Scientist 4+ years of progressive experience using python to automate and analyze solar engineering tasks and datasets Surfer 10+ years surfing shortboards, longboards, funboards, reefs, points from San Diego, CA to Sumatra, Indonesia Rock Climber 5+ years bouldering, sport climbing and trad climbing. Proud sends include Monkey Bar Traverse @ Red Rocks and The Long Climb @ Tahquitz Rock Bibliophile Favorite books include Brothers Karamazov by Fyodor Dostoyevsky, Stags Leap by Sharon Olds, and The Unbearable Lightness of Being by Milan Kundera Environmentalist I cook no meat, buy (almost) no plastic at the grocery store and drive 75% electric in my series-hybrid Chevrole Volt
